name: issue tracker output records the corresponding linked PR number when issue links to a fix PR
command: mkdir -p fixtures && printf '{"number":7,"labels":["security"],"body":"Fixed in #42","linked_pr":42}\n' > fixtures/issues.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/issue-tracker.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub fixtures/issues.jsonl --emit patterns --out patterns.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"linked_pr":42' patterns.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
